datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.description: Manage datasets for evaluation and experimentation

empty.title: No datasets yet
empty.description: Get started by creating your first dataset.

addItem.title: Add suite item
addItem.discardChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them and close?

removeItems.title: Remove suite items
removeItems.description: The items will be deleted from your current suite view. The changes won't take effect until you save and create a new version.

actionsPanel.samplesAddedDescription_one: {{count}} sample added to your draft changes
actionsPanel.samplesAddedDescription_other: {{count}} samples added to your draft changes

exportPanel.closeExportPanelDescription: You have exports that are still being prepared. Closing this panel will hide the progress and you won't be notified when they complete.

rowActions.deleteDescription: Deleting this {{entityName}} will also remove all its items. Any experiments linked to it will be moved to a "Deleted test suite" group. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?
rowActions.exportFailedDescription: Failed to start test suite export. Please try again.

batchActions.deleteDescription: Deleting these {{entityName}} will also remove all their items. Any experiments linked to them will be moved to a 'Deleted test suites' group. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

itemsActions.exportDisabled: Export functionality is disabled for this installation

addToDataset.title: Add to test suite
addToDataset.noTestSuitesYet: There are no test suites yet
addToDataset.noValidRows: There are no rows that can be added as test suite items. The input field is missing.
addToDataset.partialValidRows: Only rows with input fields will be added as test suite items.

feedbackDefinition.name: Name
feedbackDefinition.booleanDescription: Use binary labels (e.g. "Pass", "Fail") to evaluate outputs.
feedbackDefinition.numericalDescription: Use a numerical range (e.g. 1–5) to rate outputs quantitatively.

addEditDialog.name: Name
addEditDialog.uploadLabel: Upload a CSV or JSON file
addEditDialog.fileCantBeUploadedDescription: This file cannot be uploaded because it does not pass validation. If you continue, the {{typeLabel}} will be created without any items. You can add items manually later, or go back and upload a valid file.
addEditDialog.uploadAcceptedDescription: Your {{format}} file is being processed in the background. Items will appear automatically when ready. If you don't see them, try refreshing the page.

testSuite.assertionPlaceholder: e.g. Response should be factually accurate and cite sources

itemEditor.recordIdCopiedToClipboard: Record ID successfully copied to clipboard
itemEditor.mustBeValidJsonObjectOrArray: Must be a valid JSON object or array

listPage.noTestSuitesYet: There are no test suites yet
listPage.emptyDatasetDescription:
Get started by creating your first dataset.
Define inputs and expected outputs to evaluate and optimize your agent.
listPage.emptyTestSuiteDescription:
Get started by creating your first test suite.
Define test cases with expected outputs and scoring to compare and optimize your configurations.

navigation.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved draft changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

discardDialog.title: Discard changes
discardDialog.description: Discarding will remove all unsaved edits to this {{entityName}}. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

itemsTab.allItemsDeleted: All {{itemName}}s on this page have been deleted
itemsTab.loadingDescription: Some results or counts may update as more data becomes available. You can continue exploring while the full {{entityName}} loads.
itemsTab.emptyDescription: Add {{itemName}}s to run evaluations and measure performance.

createMenu.importFromCsvJson: Import from a CSV or JSON file

csvDropzone.preferSdk: CSV or JSON. Prefer to use code instead?

uploadField.description: Drop a CSV or JSON file to upload or

uploadDescription.supportedFormats: Supported formats: .csv, .json, .jsonl/.ndjson. File can be up to {{fileSizeLimit}}MB in size and will be processed in the background.

overrideVersion.title: Version conflict detected
overrideVersion.description: Another version was created while you were editing. Do you want to override the latest version with your changes?

empty.title: No samples to display
empty.description: No samples were generated. This might indicate an issue with the generation process. Please try generating samples again.

expansion.title: Expand with AI
expansion.description: This will generate synthetic samples based on your existing data patterns. The generated samples will be available for review before adding to your {{entityName}}.

error.title: Generation Error
error.default: An error occurred while generating samples. Please try again.

empty.title: No {{entityName}} samples found
empty.description: This {{entityName}} appears to be empty. Add some sample data to your {{entityName}} first before trying to expand it with AI.

structure.title: Detected {{entityName}} structure
structure.tooltip: Choose which fields to maintain consistency for

tips.title: Field preservation tips:
tips.autoSelect: • Fields appearing in ≥{{threshold}}% of samples are auto-selected
tips.maintainPatterns: • Selected fields will maintain similar patterns in generated data

expansion.additionalInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., Create variations that test edge cases, focus on different user personas

prompt.title: Generation prompt
prompt.description: Customize the prompt sent to the AI model
prompt.customize: Customize the prompt that will be sent to the AI model. Use clear instructions for best results.

validation.sampleCount: Sample count must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.promptLength: Custom prompt must be at least {{min}} characters long.
validation.analysisInProgress: Analysis is still in progress. Please wait for it to complete.

loadIntoPlayground.title: Load {{entityName}} into playground
loadIntoPlayground.description: Loading this {{entityName}} into the Playground will replace any unsaved changes. This action cannot be undone.

useDataset.openInPlaygroundDescription: Test prompts over your {{entityName}} and run evaluations interactively
useDataset.runExperimentDescription: Use this {{entityName}} to run an experiment using the Python SDK

noData.title: No version history yet
noData.description: Version history will appear here when you create dataset versions

datasetItemsSave.newVersionCreatedDescription: Your changes have been saved as a new version. You can now use it to run experiments in the SDK or the Playground.

versionForm.versionNotePlaceholder: Describe what changed in this version

addVersion.title: Save changes
addVersion.description: Saving your changes will create a new version. You'll be able to use it in experiments or in the Playground. The previous version will remain available in version history.

editVersion.title: Edit version
editVersion.description: Edit the version note and tags to keep your dataset versions organized.

restore.title: Restore version
restore.description: Restoring this version will create a new version based on version {{versionName}}. All previous versions will stay in your history.
restore.draftWarning: You have unsaved draft changes that will be discarded. This action can't be undone.

testSuiteItem.itemIdCopiedToClipboard: Item ID successfully copied to clipboard

testSuiteSettings.title: Test settings
testSuiteSettings.runsPerItemDescription: Sets how many times each item runs.
testSuiteSettings.passThresholdDescription: Define how many runs must succeed.

datasetVersionSelectBox.createTestSuiteHint: Create a test suite with examples to evaluate your prompt on.

redirectDatasets.testSuiteNotFound: This test suite could not be found
redirectDatasets.testSuiteNotFoundMessage: The test suite you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.
